reviews.comment:
Buen hay de todo pero lentos. Si estas apurado no es recomendable. Si necesitas cualquier cosa lo encontras. Pero anda con tiempo

(Translated by Google)
They have a good selection, but they're slow. If you're in a hurry, it's not recommended. If you need anything, you'll find it. But go with plenty of time.

reviews.comment:
Imposible comunicarse por teléfono para pedir turno para realizar la VTV, hace tres días que llamo y no atiende nadie y solo tienen un numero de teléfono  472 3077 suena 10 o 15 veces y se corta automáticamente, es una vergüenza, soy socio desde el año 1971 y creo tendrían que tener una mejor atención al socio.

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to get through by phone to schedule an appointment for the vehicle inspection (VTV). I've been calling for three days and no one answers. They only have one phone number, 472 3077, which rings 10 or 15 times and then disconnects automatically. It's a disgrace. I've been a member since 1971 and I think they should provide better customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNE5YNUV3EAE
